'''shatuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobbie|jobbie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobbie|jobbie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shatuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shætiyith|shætiyith]] || [[word:shætiyij|shætiyij]] || [[word:shætiyish|shætiyish]] || [[word:shætiyi|shætiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shatutuyuth|shatutuyuth]] || [[word:shatutuyuj|shatutuyuj]] || [[word:shatutuyush|shatutuyush]] || [[word:shatutuyu|shatutuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shatuyuth|shatuyuth]] || [[word:shatuyuj|shatuyuj]] || [[word:shatuyush|shatuyush]] || [[word:shatuyu|shatuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shatufyuth|shatufyuth]] || [[word:shatufyuj|shatufyuj]] || [[word:shatufyush|shatufyush]] || [[word:shatufyuf|shatufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shatuyuthu|shatuyuthu]] || [[word:shatuyuju|shatuyuju]] || [[word:shatuyushu|shatuyushu]] || [[word:shatuyuku|shatuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shatuyuth|shatuyuth]] || [[word:shatuyuj|shatuyuj]] || [[word:shatuyush|shatuyush]] || [[word:shatuyu|shatuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shatuyuthul|shatuyuthul]] || [[word:shatuyujul|shatuyujul]] || [[word:shatuyushul|shatuyushul]] || [[word:shatuyukul|shatuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shatuyuthuthu|shatuyuthuthu]] || [[word:shatuyujuju|shatuyujuju]] || [[word:shatuyushushu|shatuyushushu]] || [[word:shatuyuku|shatuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shatuyuthun|shatuyuthun]] || [[word:shatuyujun|shatuyujun]] || [[word:shatuyushun|shatuyushun]] || [[word:shatuyukun|shatuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shatuyuthuoro|shatuyuthuoro]] || [[word:shatuyujuoro|shatuyujuoro]] || [[word:shatuyushuoro|shatuyushuoro]] || [[word:shatuyukuoro|shatuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
